headline: Loan Growth, Higher Fee Income to Drive Truist's Q1 Earnings
summary: TFC heads into Q1 2026 earnings with strong loan demand and higher fee income, but rising non-accrual loans loom.

headline: What To Expect From State Street’s (STT) Q1 Earnings
summary: Financial services giant State Street (NYSE:STT) will be announcing earnings results this Friday morning. Here’s what to expect.
